attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SICQV.OBJECT_ID, SICQV.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, SICQV.ERP_PRICE_LIST_ID, SICQV.CREATED_BY, SICQV.CREATED_ON, SICQV.UPDATED_BY, SICQV.UPDATED_ON, SICQV.ACTIVE, SICQV.NET_PRICE_DEAL, SICQV.FRAME_AGREEEMENT, SICQV.SOURCE_TYPE, SICQV.PROD_PRICING_COMMENT, SICQV.SERV_PRICING_COMMENT, SICQV.PRICE_LIST_ID, SICQV.INACTIVE_OBJECT_ID, SICQV.BOM_STATE, SICQV.LAST_PRICED_DATE, SICQV.CART_ID, SICQV.SITE_OBJECT_ID, SICQV.BOM_SOURCE, SICQV.CONTRACTUAL_DISC, SICQV.QUOTE_IMPORT_DATE, SICQV.QUOTE_ID, SICQV.QUOTE_NAME, SICQV.TRADEIN_STATE, SICQV.CBN_STATUS, SICQV.CBN_DISTI_ID, SICQV.IS_Q2O_ELIGIBLE, SICQV.DISCOUNT_SUMMARY, SICQV.AUTO_NEGOTIATE_NS, SICQV.CBN_SPLIT_ELIGIBLE, SICQV.IS_DISTI_Q2O_ELIGIBLE, SICQV.TAB_FLAG, SICQV.TAB_SUBTRACK, SICQV.TAB_PERIOD, SICQV.PRICE_BOOK_ID, SICQV.CURRENCY_CODE, SICQV.BILLING_TERM, SICQV.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, SICQV.FULFILLMENT_SOURCE_ID, SICQV.IRONPORT_FLAG, SICQV.PRICED_FOR_AUTH, SICQV.COPY_FROM_QUOTE, SICQV.QUOTE_STATUS, SICQV.INTENDED_USE, SICQV.QUOTE_CATEGORY, SICQV.QUOTE_EXPIRATION_DATE, SICQV.IS_STRINGENT, SICQV.IS_FINALIZED, SICQV.CUSTOMER_CATALOG_FLAG, SICQV.IS_FA_FLAG, SICQV.FA_DEAL_ID, SICQV.FEDERAL_FLG, SICQV.TAA_FLG, SICQV.IS_ERATE_DEAL, SICQV.RN, SICQV.QUOTE_STATUS_NAME, SICQV.INCREMENTAL_DISCOUNT_FLG, SICQV.GDR_FLAG, SICQV.STD_INCR_FLAG, SICQV.CRP_FLAG,
SICQV.LEAD_PARTNER_TYPE,
SICQV.LEAD_PARTNERS,
SICQV.IS_PCM
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_VW SICQV
 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_CQ_SINGLE_QUOTE_VW ELCQV
where SICQV.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=ELCQV.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
AND SICQV.OBJECT_ID= ELCQV. OBJECT_ID)
